old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-t5j2","title":"Avoid LinkLayer TX priority inversion","description":"Python LinkLayer holds _tx_lock while enqueueing, running CAD retries, and draining. A later ROUTING/ACK send cannot enter the priority queue while an earlier BULK send waits, so bulk may transmit first and the higher-priority packet may expire before enqueue. Redesign serialization so radio operations remain single-flight while priority enqueue remains responsive. Discovered reviewing convergence commit d422a03b; outside frozen reconciliation.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:07:21.300296277Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-21T02:07:21.300296277Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t5j2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-7fqg.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-21T02:07:21.386296333Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
